message:
fix(auth): remove double-space in OAuth form parameter encoding

Fix malformed URL-encoded form bodies where parameters had an extra
space before the equals sign (e.g. client_secret  = instead of
client_secret=). Affects 4 OAuth token exchange/refresh functions:
- exchange_sap_access_token_with_client
- exchange_google_authorization_code
- refresh_google_oauth_token_with_project
- refresh_kimi_code_oauth_token

The double-space would produce invalid form encoding that could cause
OAuth endpoint parsing failures on strict servers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
